description_long: This is a classic twin-bell alarm clock with a round metallic body finished in a deep reddish-brown color. The clock features two prominent bells on top, separated by a small hammer, and stands on two angled metal legs with a third support at the back. The face of the clock is plain white with no visible numerals or markings, and it has two simple, dark-colored hands for indicating the time. The back of the clock reveals winding knobs and adjustment levers, typical of mechanical alarm clocks. The overall design is robust and slightly retro, with a glossy metallic sheen and minimal decorative elements.
description: A retro twin-bell alarm clock with a glossy reddish-brown metal body, plain white face, and two simple hands. It stands on angled legs and features classic winding mechanisms on the back.
description_view_0: Front view showing the plain white clock face, two dark hands, and twin bells on top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curved metallic body and one of the bells, with angled legs visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the winding knobs, adjustment levers, and the back support leg.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other bell and the rounded metallic casing.
attribute_face_design: Circular white face with no visible numerals or markings, featuring two simple hands and a minimalist design.
